response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile senior engineer with 13+ years across web, backend, and high-throughput systems (Sociomantic handled millions of HTTP requests/second), plus open-source platform leadership through GISCollective. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry foundations, or statistical analysis — all central to this Principal-level growth/experimentation role. Language coverage skews JS/TS/DLang rather than the C#/Java/Python ecosystem typical of platform teams at this level, and there is no evidence of IC6-equivalent cross-team platform ownership. Worth a screening conversation to probe experimentation exposure, but not an obvious fit on paper.
strengths: High-scale production experience at Sociomantic with low-latency, real-time data infrastructure
Founded and operates a multi-tenant geo-data platform (GISCollective), showing systemic platform thinking
Strong engineering rigor: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, and active community teaching/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or rollout-risk systems
Missing explicit telemetry, metrics infrastructure, and statistical/bias-detection background required for the role
Title trajectory and scope read as Senior IC rather than Principal/IC6 cross-org platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Proven high-scale, low-latency production systems work
No evidence of IC6-level multi-team platform ownership
